title: Lighthouse Agentic Browsing Scoring
abstract: Lighthouse Agentic Browsing Scoring sounds pretty fancy, right? Well, it’s actually a super handy tool that automatically assesses your website’s browsing experience. Just give it a tap, and it will make those ugly and laggy websites disappear! Give it a try and watch your web browsing performance soar like a blooming flower!
abstract_zh: Lighthouse Agentic Browsing Scoring？听起来是不是有点高大上？其实它就是个能帮你自动检测网页浏览体验的超级小能手！你只需轻轻一点，就能让那些难看又卡顿的网站无处遁形。快来试试吧，让你的网页浏览体验芝麻开花——节节高！
